violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as produce and sauce in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Floors in the kitchen area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of the slicer and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Various foods in prep unit by range were observed held at 44-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Time temperature abused foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
Prep unit by range was observed in poor repair. Ambient temperature of unit was 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit to be properly adjusted/ replaced/ repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Hot water was not available at handwashing sink near ware washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Food prep sink is lacking an air gap. Sink currently has an air break. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Establishment does not have a mop sink. Mop sink must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Light bulbs near warewashing area and 1 under hood were not functional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Areas of kitchen hood and pizza hood were observed with an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

A row of tiles in the back prep area were acoustic composite ceiling tiles. This material is not durable or easily cleanable. Materials for ceiling surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The floors under the shelving in walk-in cooler and fanguards have an accumulation of food residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Floors in the kitchen area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2026
